data.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy To Raise Another $2 Billion To Buy More Bitcoin
data.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy (NASDAQ:MSTR), the largest corporate Bitcoin holder in the world, intends to issue $2 billion in convertible debt through a private offering, to buy more Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC)

data.title: Meta Stock Dips Below Short-Term Average As Mark Zuckerberg-Led Tech Giant Snaps 20-Day Winning Streak
data.description: Meta Platforms fell on Tuesday after making history with its 20-day-long winning streak. It fell below its 8-day simple moving average.

data.title: Carvana Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
Grab Stock Is Up 52% Over The Past Year, But Investor Adam Khoo Warns Of Weak 'Economic Moat' And Growth Limits
data.description: Prominent Singaporean entrepreneur Adam Khoo cast doubt on Grab Holdings Ltd's investment potential on Tuesday.

data.title: Why There's No New Steve Jobs Or Zuckerberg — Bill Gates Names The Only 20-Something Founder Who's Still In The Game
data.description: Bill Gates says the era of young tech disruptors may be over, naming only Scale AI's Alex Wang as the standout 20-something founder still making an impact in the industry.
